name: Apodaca Park
description: Come play pickleball at Apodaca Park in Las Cruces, NM! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Boys & Girls Club of Las Cruces
description: Boys & Girls Club of Las Cruces is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: East Mesa Sports Complex
description: These courts are managed by the city parks and recreation dept.

name: Las Montanas High School
description: Las Montanas High School is a place to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Meerscheidt Recreation Center
description: Meerscheidt Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Mesilla Valley Christian School
description: Come play pickleball at Mesilla Valley Christian School in Las Cruces, NM! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.

name: NMSU Activity Center
description: NMSU Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Pickle Planet
description:
Welcome to Pickle Planet, Las Cruces, New Mexico’s first and only climate-controlled indoor pickleball club, redefining the game with three full-size, professional-grade courts built to USA Pickleball standards. No more battling the scorching summer heat, freezing winters, or unpredictable weather—just uninterrupted, high-quality play 24/7 with exclusive member access.

Pickle Planet isn’t just a facility—it’s a hub for the pickleball community, welcoming players of all levels—from seasoned pros using AI analytics, live streaming, and video replay to elevate their game, to first-timers eager to learn and play in a premium, tech-driven environment.

Located at 1836 W Amador Ave, Suite A, Las Cruces, NM 88005, our state-of-the-art club offers private court bookings, league play, tournaments, community events, and cutting-edge pickleball retail. Whether you're a local or traveling in, Pickle Planet is your ultimate destination for competitive and recreational pickleball in New Mexico.

name: Sierra Middle School
description: Sierra Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Sunny Acres RV Park
description: Sunny Acres RV Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Las Cruces, NM. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play.
